headline: Nebius Group’s AI Mega Deals And Insider Sales Raise Investor Questions
summary: Nebius Group (NasdaqGS:NBIS) has entered into multi year, multi billion dollar infrastructure agreements with Meta and Nvidia, including a $27b partnership with Meta. Nvidia has committed a reported $2b investment tied to Nebius Group's AI cloud build out and hardware deployments. The company is pursuing an accelerated AI data center expansion across Europe focused on multi gigawatt capacity. Following these announcements, a cluster of insider stock sales by top Nebius executives has been...

headline: CoreWeave and Meta Announce $21 Billion Expanded AI Infrastructure Agreement
summary: LIVINGSTON, N.J., April 09, 2026--CoreWeave (Nasdaq: CRWV), the Essential Cloud for AI™, today announced an expanded, long-term agreement with Meta Platforms, Inc. to provide AI cloud capacity through December 2032 for approximately $21 billion. With this deal, the two companies are continuing their existing relationship, increasing support for Meta’s development and deployment of AI.

content.title: CoreWeave and Meta Announce $21 Billion Expanded AI Infrastructure Agreement
content.summary: LIVINGSTON, N.J., April 09, 2026--CoreWeave (Nasdaq: CRWV), the Essential Cloud for AI™, today announced an expanded, long-term agreement with Meta Platforms, Inc. to provide AI cloud capacity through December 2032 for approximately $21 billion. With this deal, the two companies are continuing their existing relationship, increasing support for Meta’s development and deployment of AI.

headline: Nvidia Shares Near Level Where Technical Traders See a Breakout
summary: (Bloomberg) -- After months of sluggish returns, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is rallying again and close to breaking out of its narrow trading range, which market technicians see as a bullish signal. Shares of the chip giant are up more than 10% in the past six sessions, their longest winning streak since October. This comes after substantial stretch of nothing, with the shares essentially flat from September 2025 through the end of last month. They closed trading Wednesday at $182, near the $185 level

headline: Unum Group Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.460 Per Share of Its Common Stock
summary: CHATTANOOGA, Tenn., April 09, 2026--Effective April 9, 2026, the Unum Group (NYSE: UNM) Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.460 per share on its common stock to be paid May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 24, 2026.

headline: Meta, CoreWeave deepen AI cloud partnership with fresh $21 billion deal
summary: CoreWeave has signed a fresh $21 billion deal to provide ‌cloud computing capacity to Meta ‌Platforms, deepening their partnership as the social media ​giant expands infrastructure to support rapidly increasing artificial intelligence workloads. The latest deal, which extends through December 2032, is in ‌addition to ⁠a similar $14 billion agreement signed in September last year. Shares of ⁠CoreWeave rose 3.4% in premarket trading, while those of Meta were up 2.1%.

content.title: Meta, CoreWeave deepen AI cloud partnership with fresh $21 billion deal
content.summary: CoreWeave has signed a fresh $21 billion deal to provide ‌cloud computing capacity to Meta ‌Platforms, deepening their partnership as the social media ​giant expands infrastructure to support rapidly increasing artificial intelligence workloads. The latest deal, which extends through December 2032, is in ‌addition to ⁠a similar $14 billion agreement signed in September last year. Shares of ⁠CoreWeave rose 3.4% in premarket trading, while those of Meta were up 2.1%.

headline: Michael Burry: 'Anthropic is eating Palantir's lunch,' stock sinks
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post. CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion. BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.

content.title: Michael Burry: 'Anthropic is eating Palantir's lunch,' stock sinks
content.description:
Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories.

Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post.

CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion.

BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.
content.summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking Business News Reporter Jake Conley take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Palantir (PLTR) stock is sinking after "Big Short" investor Michael Burry said that Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) is "eating Palantir's lunch" in a now-deleted X post. CoreWeave (CRWV) and Meta (META) expanded their deal to $21 billion. BlackBerry (BB) stock is surging on the company's strong quarterly results.
